blended.narrative: Mont Blanc is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 11 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,064 ft. Looking ahead, 26 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
